suite.name: suite S1779381026992 2

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in the login form

kw.name: Enter Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters password in the login form
When the user enters valid username and password

kw.name: And User Clicks Login Button
Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Clicks the login button
And the user clicks the login button

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Products Page
Verify Login Success
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'xpath=//span[contains(text(), 'Products')]' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'xpath=//span[contains(text(), 'Products')]' but did not.

kw.doc: Verifies that login was successful
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'xpath=//span[contains(text(), 'Products')]' but did not.

kw.doc: Then the user should be redirected to the products page with welcome message
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'xpath=//span[contains(text(), 'Products')]' but did not.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Page should have contained text 'xpath=//span[contains(text(), 'Products')]' but did not.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in the login form

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Enters password in the login form
When the user enters valid username and password

kw.name: And User Clicks Login Button
kw.doc: And the user clicks the login button

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Products Page
kw.doc: Then the user should be redirected to the products page with welcome message

kw.name: When User Adds First Product To Cart
Then Product Is Added To Cart With Badge Count One
And Button Changes From Add To Remove
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_003 Access Cart And Verify Content

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Enters username in the login form

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Enters password in the login form
When the user enters valid username and password

kw.name: And User Clicks Login Button
kw.doc: And the user clicks the login button

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Products Page
kw.doc: Then the user should be redirected to the products page with welcome message

kw.name: When User Adds First Product To Cart
Then Cart Page Is Displayed
kw.doc: Then the cart page should be displayed

kw.name: And Product Is Visible In Cart
And Cart Total Price Is Correctly Calculated
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Test cases for Sauce Demo e-commerce platform
